song.title: For Those Tears I Died
song.author: Marsha Stevens
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Am F G You said You'd come and share all my sorrows. .C Am F G You said You'd be there for all my tomorrows. .C G F G I came so close to sending You away. . C Am F G And just like You promised, You came here to stay. . G7 C I just had to pray.
[C] . C7 F C And Jesus said, “Come to the water. Stand by My side. . G G7 C I know you are thirsty. You won't be denied. . C7 F C I felt every teardrop when in darkness you cried, . G G7 C-F-C And I long to remind you that for those tears I died.”
[V2] Your goodness so great I can't understand. And, dear Lord, I know that all this was planned. Savior, You're here now, and always will be. Your love is so great and always so free. But Jesus, why me?
[V3] Jesus, I give you my heart and my soul. I know, without God I'd never be whole. Savior, you opened all the right doors. I thank You and praise You from earth's humble shores. Take me, I'm Yours.
